ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., content creator, marketer, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL or file path of the user's profile picture */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* User's phone number for contact purposes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "api_keys" (
  "api_key_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each API key */,
  "key_value" TEXT /* Value of the API key */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user associated with the API key */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the API key was created */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* Expiry date of the API key */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the API key (e.g., active, expired) */,
  "last_used_date" TEXT /* Date the API key was last used */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the API key was last used */,
  "rate_limit" INTEGER /* Rate limit for API requests (e.g., 1000 requests per hour) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("api_key_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "video_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the category (e.g., active, archived) */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (for hierarchical categorization) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the category */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the category was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the category */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the category was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_video_categories_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_video_categories_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_video_categories_parent_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_category_id") REFERENCES video_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "video_category_mapping" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping */,
  "video_id" INTEGER /* ID of the video */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the mapping was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the mapping */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the mapping was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_video_category_mapping_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES video_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_video_category_mapping_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "video_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "video_id" INTEGER /* ID of the video */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the video */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the video file for this version */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the video file in bytes for this version */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the video file for this version (e.g., .avi, .mp4) */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the version was uploaded */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the version */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., active, archived) */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the video version in seconds */,
  "resolution" TEXT /* Resolution of the video version (e.g., 1080p, 4K) */,
  "transcoding_status" TEXT /* Status of video version transcoding (e.g., pending, completed, failed) */,
  "transcoding_profile" TEXT /* Profile used for transcoding the video version (e.g., HD, 4K) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_video_versions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "video_snapshots" (
  "snapshot_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each snapshot */,
  "video_id" INTEGER /* ID of the video */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the snapshot file */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the snapshot file in bytes */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the snapshot file (e.g., .jpg, .png) */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the snapshot was uploaded */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the snapshot */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the snapshot (e.g., active, archived) */,
  "thumbnail_type" TEXT /* Type of the snapshot (e.g., thumbnail, preview) */,
  "thumbnail_description" TEXT /* Description of the snapshot */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("snapshot_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_video_snapshots_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "video_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "video_id" INTEGER /* ID of the video being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the video */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the video was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the video was accessed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the video */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used to access the video (e.g., mobile, desktop) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_video_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "video_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "video_id" INTEGER /* ID of the video */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who gave the rating */,
  "rating_value" INTEGER /* Rating value (1-5) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Review text provided by the user */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the rating was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the rating was last updated */,
  "is_anonymous" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the rating is anonymous */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_video_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "video_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "video_id" INTEGER /* ID of the video */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who posted the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was last updated */,
  "is_anonymous" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the comment is anonymous */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_video_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "video_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the tag (e.g., active, archived) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the tag */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the tag was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the tag */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the tag was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "video_tag_mapping" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping */,
  "video_id" INTEGER /* ID of the video */,
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tag */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the mapping was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the mapping */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the mapping was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_video_tag_mapping_tag_id FOREIGN KEY ("tag_id") REFERENCES video_tags ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_video_tag_mapping_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "video_playlists" (
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each playlist */,
  "playlist_name" TEXT /* Name of the playlist */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the playlist */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the playlist was created */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the playlist */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the playlist is public */,
  "view_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the playlist has been viewed */,
  "share_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the playlist has been shared */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_video_playlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlist_video_mapping" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping */,
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the playlist */,
  "video_id" INTEGER /* ID of the video */,
  "added_date" TEXT /* Date the video was added to the playlist */,
  "order_index" INTEGER /* Order index of the video in the playlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlist_video_mapping_playlist_id FOREIGN KEY ("playlist_id") REFERENCES video_playlists ("playlist_id")
)
